title: Ability to embed a clickable URL in a canvas
excerpt: It would be useful in Workcanvas to have an option to add a clickable link. Right now I just paste a URL in a text box, but it would look cleaner to have a link displayed. Would be helpful for example when you want to li…

posts.author: avdmerbel (Anka van de Merbel)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be useful in Workcanvas to have an option to add a clickable link. Right now I just paste a URL in a text box, but it would look cleaner to have a link displayed. Would be helpful for example when you want to link to another canvas in your project.
